nasb.text: And Melchizedek king of Salem brought out bread and wine; now he was a priest of God Most High.

esv.text: And Melchizedek king of Salem brought out bread and wine. (He was priest of God Most High.)

cnv.text: 撒冷王麥基洗德也帶著餅和酒出來；他是至高　神的祭司。

ccb.text: 撒冷王麦基洗德也带着饼和酒出来相迎，他是至高上帝的祭司。

csbs.text: 又有撒冷王麦基洗德带着饼和酒出来；他是至高神的祭司。
